inputs.text: Product: Coco Crinkle, Category: KemasAI. User Visual Prompt: A single-frame flat 2D digital graphic design layout for a continuous snack packaging wrapper, landscape orientation. The background is a clean, solid off-white cream color. The top and bottom edges are framed with flat, stylized dark brown liquid chocolate splashes. CENTER FRONT PANEL: large bubbly bold brown title "CHOCO CRINKLE" centered prominently, with a flat 2D illustration of cracked chocolate cookies resting on small chocolate chips below. LEFT AND RIGHT OUTER AREAS: reserved for back and side information layout, keeping enough clean cream space for ingredient text, nutrition facts, brand message, manufacturer information, and barcode. Strictly flat orthographic packaging design, seamless continuous wrapper layout, clean packaging graphic, pure 2D digital art.. . IMPORTANT: THIS IS A DIGITAL PRINT FILE, NOT A PHYSICAL MOCKUP. DO NOT DRAW A BAG OR POUCH. A fully unrolled, continuous flat 2D vector graphic design layout canvas, landscape orientation. CENTER FRONT PANEL: large bold title "Coco Crinkle" centered prominently. LEFT AND RIGHT OUTER AREAS: reserved for back and side information layout. Strictly flat orthographic design, pure 2D digital art, NO 3D elements, NO perspective, NO physical objects.

3D, physical object, product photography, shadow, lighting, perspective, depth, folded bag, standing pouch, glossy plastic bag, wrinkles, watermark, distorted layout, physical wrapper, realistic packaging, crimped edges
